case_title: BEHFAR INC. DBA WESTERN STATES LIQUIDATORS VS MCCLOUGH, FREDRICK MR.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $269.45 FILED BY BEHFAR INC. DBA WESTERN STATES LIQUIDATORS AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLOUGH, FREDRICK MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
